title: Wilden Releases New 76 mm Metal Equalizer Surge Dampener - Integrated SD Series
text: DOWNERS GROVE, Ill. , Oct. 27, 2022 /PRNewswire/ -- Wilden, part of PSG, a Dover (NYSE: DOV) company, and a worldwide leader in specialty pumps, today announced that it has expanded its line of metal Equalizer® Surge Dampeners – Integrated SD Series (ISD) with the addition of a new 76 mm (3") model.

title: Markem-Imaje Launches New Suite of Connected Printer Services Powered by Internet of Things Platform
text: DOWNERS GROVE, Ill. , Oct. 24, 2022 /PRNewswire/ -- Markem-Imaje, part of Dover (NYSE: DOV) and a global provider of end-to-end supply chain solutions and industrial marking and coding systems, today announced the launch of its MiVista™ connected printer services designed to streamline and improve daily coding operations across the printer fleet.

title: Inflation is dominating the conversation on earnings calls. Here's what execs are saying
text: One thing's clear at the start of the corporate earnings season: Inflation is still a hot topic for companies.

title: Dover Corporation (DOV) Q3 Earnings Surpass Estimates
text: Dover Corporation (DOV) delivered earnings and revenue surprises of 2.73% and 0.08%, respectively, for the quarter ended September 2022. Do the numbers hold clues to what lies ahead for the stock?

title: SWEP Continues Global Investment Program with Manufacturing Plant Expansions and New R&D Center
text: DOWNERS GROVE, Ill. , Oct. 18, 2022 /PRNewswire/ -- SWEP, part of Dover (NYSE: DOV) and a world-leading supplier of brazed plate heat exchangers (BPHEs), today announced that it is expanding its global footprint with multiple manufacturing plant expansions, a new R&D center and corporate head office.

title: Cook Compression Introduces COOK CLEAN Sealing System to Lower Fugitive Emissions in Reciprocating Compressors and Support Customers' Decarbonization Goals
text: DOWNERS GROVE, Ill. , Oct. 17, 2022 /PRNewswire/ -- Cook Compression , part of Dover Precision Components and Dover (NYSE: DOV), today introduced the COOK CLEANTM sealing system, a next-generation sealing system that helps lower fugitive methane emissions from packing cases to near zero levels.

title: Advansor Launches New CO2 Climate Solution with High Energy Efficiency
text: DOWNERS GROVE, Ill. , Oct. 13, 2022 /PRNewswire/ -- Advansor, part of Dover Food Retail and Dover (NYSE: DOV), today announced the launch of the CuBig II, a highly energy-efficient CO2 Climate Solution suitable for large supermarkets, cold storage and industrial applications.

title: Dover Fueling Solutions to Exhibit the DFS Hydrogen Dispenser at the 2022 Hydrogen Technology Expo Europe
text: DOWNERS GROVE, Ill. , Oct. 12, 2022 /PRNewswire/ -- Dover Fueling Solutions ("DFS"), a part of Dover (NYSE: DOV) and a leading global provider of advanced customer-focused technologies, services and solutions in the fuel and convenience retail industries, is looking forward to welcoming customers and industry partners to the 2022 Hydrogen Technology Expo at Messe Bremen, Germany from 19th – 20th October.
